enrichment.description: Luxury beachfront hotel on iconic Copacabana Beach with 1950s glamor and modern amenities. Gateway to bohemian Rio culture and gastronomy

room_types.features: 1950s-inspired style with balcony, 55" TV, minibar, digital safe, WiFi

room_types.features: City view, 1950s inspired, 55" TV, minibar, digital safe, WiFi

room_types.features: Sea view balcony, modern accommodations, 55" TV, minibar, digital safe, WiFi

room_types.features: Copacabana sea view, contemporary design, 55" TV, minibar, digital safe, WiFi

room_types.features: Sea view, executive lounge, exclusive breakfast, happy hour, Gold Solarium, 24-hour butler

room_types.name: One Bedroom Gold Suite
room_types.features: Spacious, separate living room, spectacular sea view, Gold lounge access, buffet breakfast, happy hour, Gold Solarium, 24-hour butler

enrichment.outdoor_amenities: Beachfront location on Copacabana Beach, direct beach access

restaurants.name: Fine Dining Restaurant
restaurants.description: Culinary excellence reflecting Rio's gastronomy culture

enrichment.bar_lounge: Multiple bars and lounge areas, happy hour for Gold guests
enrichment.highlights: 375 luxury rooms on Copacabana Beach, 1950s glamor with modern amenities, exclusive Fairmont Gold service, premier event spaces, pet-friendly
enrichment.spa_details: Spa spanning 400 square meters with 5 massage rooms including couples suite, sauna, beauty salon, Spa Suite
